title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Bajaj Auto Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Bajaj Auto Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Process Engineer with drive and ambition, Bajaj Auto Global Group in Lucknow is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Bajaj Auto Global Group:
Bajaj Auto Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Auto Global Group!
